calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-14-2014 Off Calendar

Notice Of Request For Entry Of Default Judgment For Damages
Off Calendar Feb-20-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Proceedings reported by: Sonia Wong, CSR#11288.

Eric Shiu, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, SALESFORCE.COM.

No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) RAPID CELLULAR LLC.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Paul Guernsey sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $1,745,550.00
Pre-Judgment Interest at the annual rate of 18%: $209,695.55
Attorney's Fees: $3,262.50
Costs: $715.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $1,959,223.05
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-03-2014 Continued To Apr-02-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
